svg.title: Concept extraction and narrative generation internals
svg.desc: Two-part diagram. Top half shows concept extraction: input semantic representation feeds into concept mapping, visualizability scoring, and dependency graph construction. Bottom half shows narrative generation: ordered concepts feed into few-shot prompting to produce a script outline with beats mapped to animations.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the semantic paper representation contain?')
sendPrompt('How does LLM-based concept mapping work?')
sendPrompt('What is visualizability scoring and how is it computed?')
sendPrompt('How is the concept dependency graph built?')
sendPrompt('What does the ordered concept list look like in practice?')
sendPrompt('What does few-shot prompting look like for script generation?')
sendPrompt('What is a narrative beat in this context?')
sendPrompt('How are animation cues linked to script beats?')
sendPrompt('What does the storyboarding stage receive as input?')
